headline: Goldman Sachs reportedly selected to lead SpaceX IPO in landmark Wall Street deal
summary: Goldman Sachs has reportedly secured the leading underwriting role for SpaceX’s expected stock market debut this year in a move that paves the way for the largest IPO in history.View on euronews

headline: OpenAI IPO Filing May Come As Soon As Friday: WSJ
summary: ChatGPT parent OpenAI is working with bankers in preparation for filing an initial public offering that could arrive in the coming days or weeks, The Wall Street Journal reported, citing people familiar with the matter.  The Journal, citing unnamed sources, reported that bankers at  Goldman Sachs Morgan Stanley  and other institutions have been helping OpenAI draft an IPO prospectus that it plans to file confidentially with regulators soon, and could be as soon as Friday.  News Corp  owner of The Wall Street Journal and Barron’s, has a content-licensing partnership with OpenAI.

content.title: OpenAI IPO Filing May Come As Soon As Friday: WSJ
content.summary: ChatGPT parent OpenAI is working with bankers in preparation for filing an initial public offering that could arrive in the coming days or weeks, The Wall Street Journal reported, citing people familiar with the matter.  The Journal, citing unnamed sources, reported that bankers at  Goldman Sachs Morgan Stanley  and other institutions have been helping OpenAI draft an IPO prospectus that it plans to file confidentially with regulators soon, and could be as soon as Friday.  News Corp  owner of The Wall Street Journal and Barron’s, has a content-licensing partnership with OpenAI.

headline: Goldman Sachs reveals lurking risks as stock market surges
summary: The S&P 500 is up roughly 10% in 2026. Global earnings are being revised higher. Corporate capital spending is at levels not seen in decades. Goldman Sachs published a global strategy note on May 19 that agrees with all of that. And then it explains why the rally may be more fragile than it ...
